official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_titles_animation body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_titles_animation to packet id 0x73.
The official set_titles_animation body is fadeIn, stay, and fadeOut as three int fields.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded timing values, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove title text, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer title text, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
